backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Booking, Report, Attendance, etc.) and initializing persistent state maps for a lab diagnostics platform with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that initializes empty hospitals and assignedHospitals maps when migrating from an old actor state to a new one.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (UI branding removal, logo addition, spacing improvements, attendance summary, etc.) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the XpertLab React app, setting the page title, favicon, viewport meta, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with routes for AppSelectorPage, PatientApp, and StaffApp, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Login screen for the phlebotomist portal that displays app features and a Sign In button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Patient-facing login screen with a hero banner, feature highlights, and Internet Identity sign-in; also shows an error if a staff account is detected.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to enter their name, phone, and (for staff) role, then save the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Staff login screen showing access-level descriptions for each role, an Internet Identity sign-in button, and optional demo-mode role buttons.
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: Reusable bottom navigation bar component that renders role-specific nav items with icons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Displays a static permissions matrix table showing which modules (booking, reports, vitals, etc.) are accessible by each app role.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Generic app shell with a sticky header (logo), main content area, and an optional floating bottom navigation bar that highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Standalone floating bottom nav bar component that maps string icon names to Lucide icons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Header bell icon button that shows an unread-count badge and opens the NotificationDrawer on click.
Slide-in sheet drawer that lists notifications with type-based icons, relative timestamps, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: App shell tailored for the patient role, featuring a header with a 'Patient' badge and a floating bottom nav using emoji/string icons.
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: Wrapper component that renders children only if the user's role is in the allowed list, otherwise shows an access-denied message or a custom fallback.
frontend/src/components/layout/ShiftGuar: Guard component that redirects phlebotomists to the attendance page when no active shift is found, while letting admins pass through unconditionally.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: App shell for staff roles with an optional demo-mode banner, a role badge in the header, and a floating bottom nav.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: Reusable button component supporting primary gradient and outline variants, three sizes, and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: Full-screen loading placeholder that pulses the app logo and displays a configurable message.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: Simple card wrapper applying medical card styles with optional hover/click interactivity.
frontend/src/components/shared/Searchabl: Searchable, multi-select list of lab tests that shows price, selection checkmarks, and a running total for selected tests.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: A React component that renders a styled badge for various status and severity types (e.g., pending, confirmed, high) using predefined CSS class mappings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A React Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile by retrieving their role from the backend actor, returning a minimal UserProfile object.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: A local-state hook for managing an in-memory list of notifications, supporting add, mark-all-read, remove, and clear operations with a cap of 20 items.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, tests, bookings, and home collection requests, including both query and mutation variants.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, typography, and reusable component classes like medical-card and floating-bottom-nav.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single cn utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAttendance: Admin page that displays currently active phlebotomist shifts with live elapsed-time tracking and a filterable shift history list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page for viewing and filtering all bookings by status or search term, with support for updating booking status via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminHospitalSa: Admin page listing hospital samples with revenue summary (total/received/pending) and an edit dialog for updating billing amounts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page that lists all lab reports with search filtering, and provides view/download actions plus a navigation button to upload new reports.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page displaying paginated audit logs with search and date-range filtering capabilities.
Admin page for creating a medical camp with name, date, and location fields; stores the camp in localStorage and displays a QR code with a copyable camp ID upon successful creation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Admin page that fetches and displays all incidents from the backend, with severity-based filtering (low/medium/high) and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SecurityLogsPag: Admin page that displays security logs with filtering by user ID and event type, and supports resetting a user's device binding via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Admin page for uploading a PDF lab report for a patient by specifying a patient principal ID and booking ID, with upload progress tracking and ICP blob storage integration.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: A landing page that presents Patient, Staff, and other portal selection cards with navigation links, branding imagery, and feature bullet points for each portal.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Demo page that visualizes role-based access control by letting users switch between roles (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) and see corresponding navigation previews and a permissions matrix.
Patient page for browsing and selecting lab tests with search functionality, showing prices and a running total, then navigating to slot selection with the chosen tests.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Patient page for requesting home sample collection, allowing users to select tests, pick a time slot, and enter an address with optional GPS-based reverse geocoding via Nominatim.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Displays a sorted list of the patient's test bookings with status badges, test names, and time slots, with a prompt to book if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Displays a sorted list of the patient's home collection requests showing address, selected tests, time slot, and status badge.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHospitalSam: Shows the patient's hospital lab sample records fetched by phone number, including a summary grid of totals and a detailed card list per sample.
Placeholder vitals page showing empty-state messaging and static cards for blood pressure and blood glucose until data is recorded by a phlebotomist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient dashboard with a welcome banner, quick-action grid for booking tests, home collection, reports, and vitals, plus shortcuts to bookings and home collections.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: Patient profile page displaying user name, role badge, phone, principal ID, and assigned hospitals, with a logout confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Displays a patient's lab reports sorted by date, with options to view or download each report file via direct URL.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows a patient to select a time slot for their chosen tests and confirm a booking, showing a summary of selected tests and total price.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/AddHospi: Form page for phlebotomists to record a new hospital sample collection, capturing patient details, hospital, test, and payment info with a confirmation dialog before submission.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Attendan: Manages phlebotomist shift check-in/check-out with on/off duty status display and a today's summary of samples collected and payment amounts.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Shows the phlebotomist's assigned home collection tasks with patient details, address, and controls to update each task's status.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/MyHospit: Lists all hospital samples collected by the logged-in phlebotomist, showing patient info, test, payment mode, and any pending amounts.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: A multi-step attendance page for phlebotomists that collects GPS location and a selfie to start/end a shift, and displays today's summary stats like samples collected and payment totals.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: A tabbed form page allowing phlebotomists to record blood pressure (systolic, diastolic, pulse) or blood glucose (RBS) readings via their respective mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: A QR code scanning page that activates the device camera to scan camp check-in QR codes and displays scan results with start/stop controls.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Displays a refreshable task queue for phlebotomists showing pending hospital bookings and assigned home collection requests fetched via query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: A form page for staff to submit incident reports with severity selection, description, and an optional photo attachment, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing app shell that handles Internet Identity authentication, role validation, lazy-loaded page routing, and profile setup modal for patient users.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Root component for the staff-facing app that handles authentication, role-based routing, and lazy-loads all staff pages (phlebotomist and admin) with role-specific navigation items.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces and types mirroring the Motoko backend models, including entities like UserProfile, Booking, HomeCollectionRequest, Incident, Attendance, and DeviceBinding.
frontend/src/utils/deviceFingerprint.ts: Provides device fingerprinting utilities: generates/persists a UUID-based device ID in localStorage, parses the user agent for OS and browser info, and combines them into a fingerprint object.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Collection of formatting helpers for dates, times, currency (INR), principal IDs, relative timestamps, and unique ID generation, supporting both bigint nanosecond and number millisecond timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/geoHelpers.ts: Geo-utility functions for attendance validation including haversine distance calculation, GPS accuracy checking, mock location detection, geofence boundary testing, and suspicious speed-jump detection between GPS readings.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines the navigation item configuration (label, path, icon) for each AppRole (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) used to build role-specific navigation menus.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Provides boolean role-check helper functions and a display name mapper for the AppRole type (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), border radii, box shadows, and animations, plus plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for XprtLab Phlebotomist Portal tracking schema version, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and a list of existing and planned features with their requirement IDs.
